TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Valana ga niya mki sku Nanto Keng atu Sin'iy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 38 buwan, 129 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 94% kyan ku 121 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 6% kyan ku 8 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 92%, Amis 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Valana hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Valana hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Valana hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Valana hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Valana hya' ga Hanbizan. tay mkyahu' na Valana hya' ga Ilausan. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ *alana ɣa nija mki s~ɕku nanto keŋ atu s~ɕinʔij ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, βunun **%, amis~ɕ *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na *alana ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na *alana ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na *alana ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na *alana ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na *alana ħjaʔ ɣa ħanβizan. taj mkjaħuʔ na *alana ħjaʔ ɣa ilaus~ɕan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Valana ga niya mki sku Nanto Keng atu Sin'iy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 38 buwan, 129 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 94% kyan ku 121 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 6% kyan ku 8 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 92%, Amis 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Valana hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Valana hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Valana hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Valana hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Valana hya' ga Hanbizan. tay mkyahu' na Valana hya' ga Ilausan. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ *alana ɣa nija mki s~ɕku nanto keŋ atu s~ɕinʔij ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, βunun **%, amis~ɕ *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na *alana ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na *alana ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na *alana ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na *alana ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na *alana ħjaʔ ɣa ħanβizan. taj mkjaħuʔ na *alana ħjaʔ ɣa ilaus~ɕan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
